economic_mechanism: Multiple officers/directors spending their own capital on timely disclosed direct open-market common-share purchases may convey issuer-specific valuation information that diffuses over ten sessions.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact SEC_FORM4_CLUSTERED_INSIDER_BUYING_CALL_21D_V1 / SEC_FORM4_CLUSTERED_OPEN_MARKET_BUYING_FORWARD_UPDRIFT on the frozen present-day liquid single-name panel: original timely Form 4, non-derivative P/A/D common equity, officer/director, transaction value at least $10,000, two distinct owners and accessions, aggregate at least $100,000 within 20 calendar days, first-public filing signal, next-session-close entry, ten-session exit, prior-only same-symbol controls, chronological 60/40 train/sealed holdout, and zero option pricing. Future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide bull-call debit spread only: capital_fit_usd=200, frictionless planning max_loss_usd=200 before closing friction, max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact family unless train has at least 24 matched pairs across at least six signal years and six symbols, control support at least 70%, event mean after 10 bps above 0.25%, paired excess above 0.20%, circular three-pair-block LB90 above zero, event positive frequency at least 55%, event-return worst-decile mean after 10 bps at least -8%, and zero source/chronology/control/overlap/holdout integrity violations; do not read holdout outcomes or price options.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact family remains F0 and is closed. Six matched train pairs covered only 2016 and 2019 across five symbols; event/control/paired means after 10 bps were +1.482930%/+1.016569%/+0.466362%, paired median -1.224306%, circular block LB90 -2.665298%, event hit rate 50%, and event-return worst-decile -5.585214%. Density, year, symbol, LB90, and hit gates failed. No F1/F2/L1, living candidate, quality leader, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority was earned.

search_information.summary: The wake added and exercised an official SEC Form 4 archive lab with strict filters, first-public-date chronology, prior-only controls, sealed holdout identities, stable persisted-byte provenance, and strict JSON. Finalizer made the event-return tail label machine-explicit without changing rows or outcome. The third consecutive active-epoch no-advance decision completed the epoch at burst stop and forces search-design reassessment before another strategy test.

useful_deltas.summary: Added a reusable official SEC quarterly Form 3/4/5 archive adapter and train-only clustered-buying event-study runner with hash-cited persisted inputs, strict filing/transaction filters, lag-safe next-session entry, deterministic prior-only same-symbol controls, sealed holdout identities, strict JSON, and explicit one-lot planning boundaries; behavior, parser, chronology, positive, and negative controls are executable tests.

Claim evaluation now reopens the persisted SEC bytes after a first download, and the claim exposes event_return_worst_decile_mean plus an event-specific tail gate/methodology label so paired-excess tail cannot be inferred. Regressions prove persisted-byte consumption and event-versus-paired tail separation; the unchanged real-data decision replay remains FAMILY_CLOSED.

Closed both stable IDs for the exact high-specificity Form 4 cluster geometry after the frozen train conjunction failed at n6, two years, five symbols, LB90 -2.665298%, and 50% event hit rate. Median/max prior-control distance 641.5/1,254 sessions further weakens local specificity; the six matched holdout identities remain unread and option pricing is zero.

Counted the 0335 sector-leader, 0408 credit-risk, and 0454 Form 4 closes as three consecutive no-advance decisions; completed POST_REASSESSMENT_INDEPENDENT_DEFINED_RISK_DISCOVERY_V1 at 0454 with pivot and burst-stop true, retained the prior reassessment path, and prohibited a fourth strategy test before a dedicated reassessment decides successor charter versus DIMINISHING_RETURNS.

critic_findings.finding: N1: label the -5.585214% worst-decile metric as event-return tail rather than paired excess.
critic_findings.rationale: The canonical claim, gate key, methodology boundary, charter, and living reports now say event-return worst-decile after 10 bps. A negative-control test constructs different event and paired tails and asserts the serialized event-specific field and gate.

critic_findings.finding: N2: keep the ten-session F0 underlying horizon distinct from the 18-24 DTE planning bull-call expression and its unmeasured theta/vega/debit path.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an observed defect because the charter and claim already separate the fixed ten-session underlying test from the future conditional option plan, report option_pricing_calls=0, and deny F1/L1/paper authority. Finalizer living surfaces reinforce that the planning expression is unvalidated and not a 21D option result.

critic_findings.finding: N3: preserve 641.5/1,254-session control-distance weakness as a recurring local-specificity problem.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a missing-evidence defect because both machine fields were already present and independently reproduced. The finalizer promotes them into the completed epoch record, readiness, finalizer report, search-information summary, and reassessment NEXT without widening control tolerances.

critic_findings.finding: N4: preserve the bulk Form 4 owner-attribution L0 limitation and prohibit a same-geometry reopen without a new predeclared evidence class.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an unhandled defect because executor evidence already required two accessions, explicitly disclosed that bulk transaction rows are not owner-attributed, kept authority at L0, and quarantined same-geometry owner-join polish. Finalizer reports retain that boundary.

critic_findings.finding: N5: keep present-day-panel survivorship as an L0 scope limit, not a free panel-expansion reopen.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as an unhandled defect because the claim's population boundary and exact-family quarantine already state the current-panel limitation and forbid panel expansion as novelty. No panel, threshold, sign, horizon, or option-wrapper salvage was performed.

critic_findings.finding: N6: after acceptance, advance the active-epoch count from two to three, set burst stop, and preserve phase ownership of integration state.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a challenger-phase defect because streak two/burst false was the correct pre-finalizer state. Finalizer now records the accepted third decision, sets pivot=true and burst=true, completes the epoch at completed_stamp 2026-07-16T0454, retains its reassessment path, and does not open a successor before the dedicated reassessment.

critic_findings.finding: N7: independently rerun focused behavior/boundary/negative controls and the full unittest suite rather than inherit executor counts.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a code defect because this is finalizer process ownership. learning-promotion.md records the exact independently rerun commands and results; no executor full-suite count is used as final proof.

data_dependencies: No new data are required to preserve the exact family close. Reopening requires a materially different corporate-information mechanism or predeclared evidence class, not looser cluster thresholds, a single-insider variant, panel expansion, owner-join polish, or an option wrapper after inspecting n6.

A future acceptance-timestamped EDGAR design would need filing acceptance provenance and a materially different predeclared information event before outcomes; it cannot reuse this exact cluster as a threshold salvage.
Any future option expression requires actual listed contract geometry, debit/quote friction, theta/vega path, management, and assignment/exercise evidence; this F0 run priced zero options.

no_advance_context.reason: The 0335 sector-leader, 0408 credit-risk-off, and 0454 Form 4 clustered-buying closes are the three counted decisions in the successor epoch; no candidate advanced, so the epoch terminates at its predeclared burst stop.

next: SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESS_AFTER_FORM4_CLUSTER_DENSITY_UNCERTAINTY_CLOSE: stop the completed three-no-advance burst. Reconcile the 0335 sector-leader, 0408 credit-risk-off, and 0454 Form 4 closes; inventory genuinely open mechanisms and point-in-time data classes not covered by nearby-retune quarantines; diagnose recurring sparse-event, remote-control, uncertainty-bound, and horizon/expression weaknesses; then either write a successor epoch with a revised charter and predeclared success criterion or declare DIMINISHING_RETURNS. Do not open sealed holdouts, loosen the Form 4 geometry, or launch a fourth strategy test before reassessment.
